message:
style: apply rustfmt and clippy formatting across 8 files

Automated formatting pass that normalizes whitespace and import ordering
throughout the codebase without changing any runtime behavior:

- symbol_cancel.rs: remove trailing whitespace in store/drop sequence
- h1/codec.rs: reflow parse_request_line_bytes URI binding for line length
- io/copy.rs: expand inline trait impls in copy_bidirectional test to
  standard multi-line format, normalize trailing whitespace throughout
- raptorq/gf256.rs: alphabetize x86/x86_64 SIMD intrinsic imports,
  reformat multi-line assert! macro for readability
- raptorq/linalg.rs: alphabetize gf256 re-imports (Gf256 before functions)
- runtime/reactor/epoll.rs: remove trailing whitespace after lock acquire
- runtime/reactor/mod.rs: remove trailing whitespace in events capacity test
- transport/router.rs: fix trailing comma to bare brace in match arm

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
